name: owasp_security_review
summary: Review code or project files for defensive security issues using OWASP-backed retrieval.
description: Performs a bounded static security audit of selected files or project roots, retrieves relevant OWASP ASVS and Top 10 references, and reports citation-backed defensive findings.
when_to_use: Use when the user asks for a security audit of code or a project path.
Use when the user asks to review code against OWASP guidance.
Use when the user asks to inspect files for application security risks.
when_not_to_use: Do not use for create, edit, refactor, fix, debug, or test tasks.
Do not use for general code quality review without a security or OWASP focus.
Do not use for exploit automation, payload generation, live attack guidance, or offensive testing.
trigger_actions: review app.py for OWASP security issues
inspect auth.py for application security risks

path.description: Relative sandbox file or project directory to audit.

review_limits.description: Boundaries, skipped files, and confidence limits for the static review.

preconditions: The referenced file or project directory exists in the sandbox.
The OWASP reference index exists. If it is missing, report that setup/admin index rebuild is required.
